preview_text:
The model rates USA as the narrow favorite at 45% to win, with Paraguay at 24% and a draw standing at 31%. USA edges the underdog but holds no dominant edge in this neutral-venue fixture.

The predicted outcome distribution suggests competitive balance. The 21-point spread between USA's best chance and Paraguay's win probability leaves room for an upset, while the draw probability of 31% indicates the match could plausibly end level. A one-goal margin separates the modal outcomes rather than a commanding gap.

Model and sportsbook are closely aligned across all three outcomes. The market assigns USA 48%, Paraguay 25%, and a draw 27%—gaps of 3 percentage points or less on each line. Both sources view this as genuinely competitive, with modest odds favoring the USA side. No strong disagreement exists between the forecast and consensus.
